instruction: I'd like to use the candle in the kitchen tonight, and I need a bottle of wine set out in the bedroom. Please pick up the candle and head to the kitchen, then pick up the wine bottle and go to the bedroom.
target_description: I'd like to use the candle in the kitchen tonight, and I need a bottle of wine set out in the bedroom. Please pick up the candle and head to the kitchen, then pick up the wine bottle and go to the bedroom.
